GpuSortExec: expr=[promotions@0 ASC NULLS LAST, total@1 ASC NULLS LAST], fetch=100
  GpuProjectExec: expr=[promotions@0 as promotions, total@1 as total, CAST(promotions@0 AS Decimal128(15, 4)) / CAST(total@1 AS Decimal128(15, 4)) * Some(100),20,0 as promotional_sales.promotions / all_sales.total * Int64(100)]
    CrossJoinExec
      GpuProjectExec: expr=[sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)@0 as promotions]
        GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)]
          GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
